title: Metrica: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Metrica turns raw events into clear answers, so your team ships the features people actually want.
Skip the spreadsheets and SQL gymnastics. Metrica answers product questions in seconds.
cards: Spot where users drop off and which features keep them coming back.
Group users by behavior and watch how engagement holds over time.
Ask a question and get a chart back before your coffee cools.
Follow real paths through your product, step by step.
Granular controls, data residency and full audit logs by default.
Get pinged the moment a key metric moves, not a week later.

sections.text: Point and click your way to answers. No SQL, no waiting on the data team, just the metric you need right now.
bullets: Breakdowns by any property in one click
Saved views your whole team can share

sections.text: One clean event model means everyone reads the same chart the same way. No duplicate metrics, no arguing about definitions.

steps: Add a few lines and start sending events in minutes.
Define the actions that matter with a guided setup.
Invite your team and watch the insights roll in.

sections.quote: We finally killed our weekly metrics spreadsheet. With Metrica anyone on the team can answer their own product questions in seconds.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Pay only when your event volume grows.

items: Is there really a free plan?
Yes. The Free plan covers up to one million events a month, forever, with no card required.
Drop in our SDK or use the HTTP API. Most teams are sending data within an hour.
Can I track without third-party cookies?
Yes. Metrica works server-side and first-party, so it keeps reporting even when cookies are blocked.
Data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with roles, data residency and audit logs on paid plans.
Growth and Scale plans include guided onboarding and a metric design review.

sections.sub: Join thousands of teams who trade guesswork for clear product analytics.

sections.tagline: Product analytics that turn events into clear answers. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Metrica is a sample template with dummy content
